title: 4級 模擬テスト3 会話文 1
prompt:
次の対話の（　　　）に入れるのに最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

B: (      ). There were 117 people!

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 リスニング第1部 1
prompt:
対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 3-1]
audioText:
A: Did you enjoy the environmental projects in Rome, Nancy?
B: Yes, but it was a bit crowded. Over 117 people were there.
A: I see. Would you go there again?

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 語句整序 1
prompt:
日本文の意味に合うように語句を並べ替えたとき、最も自然な文を選びなさい。

彼女は2011年からenvironmental projectsのために毎日一生懸命働いています。
She ( 1. working / 2. for / 3. is / 4. hard ) the environmental projects since 2011.
[Mock 3-1]
explanation: grade4-03-ordering-01: 語句整序の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 語句整序 2

日本文の意味に合うように語句を並べ替えたとき、最も自然な文を選びなさい。

Miamiの人々はpart-time jobsについて話し合いました。
People in Miami ( 1. about / 2. discussed / 3. issues / 4. the ) part-time jobs.
[Mock 3-2]
explanation: grade4-03-ordering-02: 語句整序の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is Rome planning to organize more events?
[Mock 3-1]
passage: Recently, environmental projects has become very popular in Rome. Since 2011, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 117 more events related to environmental projects.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
Because it helps build a strong community.
Because they want to make money.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

[Mock 3-2]
passage: Recently, part-time jobs has become very popular in Miami. Since 2012, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 124 more events related to part-time jobs.
choices: Because they want to make money.

Because it helps build a strong community.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-02: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
